creator: gerald@pfeifer.com
text:
Due to confusions with git, the version management system,
	the authors of this software have been in the process to
	rename things from git to gnuit (GNU Interactive Tools).

	The PORTNAME of this port already reflects this change, and
	we do not install a git command or git man page any more.

	The main thing missing is now renaming the port from misc/git
	to misc/gnuit.

Fix: 

Repocopy/repomove misc/git -> misc/gnuit.
